items.caption: A screenshot of a webpage with a product description for a "blush mink faux fur limited edition throw" by a person named "<person>". the text describes the product as a "fabulous-furs fluffy blanket" with features such as "fuzzy blanket", "cozy blankets", "decorative throw blankets", "big fluffy blanket", "fluffy pillows", "pink blanket", "heavy blanket", and "faux fur blanket". the background of the image is not visible, as the focus is on the text.
